name: Rusty Sword
description: Seen better days. But it's sharp enough.
flavorText: A thousand dungeons. A thousand owners.

name: Leather Chestpiece
flavorText: It smells like someone else's fear.

name: Iron Shield
description: Blocks hits. That's about all you can ask.
flavorText: Dented in thirty places. None of them fatal.

name: Wooden Dagger
flavorText: The kind of thing that ends up in a back.

name: Novice Grimoire
flavorText: Page 14 has a doodle of a frog.

name: Holy Symbol
description: A small medallion engraved with the seven sigils.
flavorText: The metal is warm. It always is.

name: Steel Longsword
description: The weapon of choice for any self-respecting knight.

name: Chainmail
description: Takes a beating and keeps going.
flavorText: A thousand interlocking rings. One interlocking story.

name: Ranger's Longbow
description: Carved from yew. Strung with grief.
flavorText: Shoots straight. The archer's aim is another matter.

name: Mage's Staff
description: Channels magical energy. Dangerous in capable hands.
flavorText: The wood is warm to the touch. It always has been.

name: Blessed Mace
description: Crushes both flesh and unholy will.
flavorText: The undead recoil from it. It does not care.

name: Bone Scepter
description: Carved from a femur. Whose, exactly, is a question for another day.
flavorText: It hums when corpses are nearby.

name: Flameblade
description: Forged in the fires of a long-dead volcano. The heat never left.
flavorText: Whoever carries it next will be hunted by whoever carried it last.

name: Shadowstep Boots
description: Makes almost no sound on stone. Almost.
flavorText: The dungeon still heard them. The dungeon hears everything.

name: Amulet of Vitality
description: Pulses with a faint heartbeat. Someone else's.
flavorText: Previous owner had great vitality. Past tense.

name: Stream Relic
description: A glittering memento that hums with viewer attention.
flavorText: It still buzzes faintly with notifications.

name: Iron Key
description: Opens locked doors. Some adventurers find these stashed in unsuspecting rooms.
flavorText: Heavier than it looks. Most are.
